definition: The mind as an experiential and affective center that can be trained, collected, liberated, and observed.
notes: The project prefers mind because it is the cleanest default in contemporary English. Heart-mind remains acceptable in explanatory prose when the affective coloration matters, but consciousness should be avoided because that territory is already occupied by viññāṇa in this dataset.

context_rules.context: In most doctrinal and practical contexts
In explanatory prose where emotional tone and cognition are both clearly in play
context_rules.notes: Use sparingly and only when the fuller nuance helps.

example_phrases.translation: one remains observing the mind in relation to the mind
